query_basis: Reviewed official Alaska DEED district-profiles search, district map, and district detail leaves; borough-named county rows match official district entries and the state directory includes REAA districts for unorganized areas.

samples.sample_name: Alaska Public Schools Database District Profiles Search
samples.evidence_snippet: The official DEED district-profiles search lists Alaska local systems including Aleutians East Borough School District, Anchorage School District, Bristol Bay Borough School District, Denali Borough School District, and REAA districts such as Bering Strait, Lower Yukon, and Yukon-Koyukuk.

samples.sample_name: Aleutians East Borough School District Profile
samples.evidence_snippet: The official district profile preserves local routing fields including district address, telephone, fax, district email, district website, and superintendent contact for Aleutians East Borough School District.

The official Alaska District Map page links the district-profiles search and enumerates borough districts plus REAA and regional school systems such as Lower Kuskokwim, Lower Yukon, Southwest Region, Yukon Flats, and Yukon-Koyukuk for unorganized areas.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Disability Law Center of Alaska is an independent non-profit law firm providing legal advocacy for people with disabilities anywhere in Alaska and preserves statewide intake, information, and grievance routes.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.

Reviewed live official Alaska DPA/SDS office-location, default, contact, and legacy dhss.alaska.gov alias roots; all resolved to the same Cloudflare "Just a moment..." HTTP 403 shell in the current lane.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-22 live official Alaska DPA and SDS office-directory candidates on health.alaska.gov, including office-locations, default, and contact roots, plus legacy dhss.alaska.gov aliases that now redirect back to the same health.alaska.gov surfaces. Every checked office candidate returned HTTP 403 with the Cloudflare "Just a moment..." shell, so county-grade local-office evidence is blocked at the domain level rather than at one stale page.

samples.evidence_snippet: Static and browser-assisted checks both returned only a Cloudflare security-verification shell titled "Just a moment..." instead of office-by-area content on the official DPA office-locations page.
The official SDS contact leaf still resolves only to a Cloudflare security-verification shell in both static and bounded browser-assisted checks, with no reviewed local office content.
The official SDS intellectual-and-developmental-disabilities leaf still returns only a Cloudflare security-verification shell instead of area office routing or county-grade contact evidence.
